creator: thomas.horna@gmail.com
text:
Worked here too, with proposed  procedure, on:
FreeBSD syslog 10.1-RELEASE-p26 FreeBSD 10.1-RELEASE-p26 #0: Wed Jan 13 20:59:29 UTC 2016     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

With relp, gssapi, gnutls, mysql, dbi, docs, normalize options.
